productDisplayName: Police Unisex And Unisex Pack of 2 Deos
description: Set of two police deodorants for women These Police deodorants for women contain the heavy duty essential every woman needs, whether she is out jogging in the wee hours of the morning or working at her corporate job - a perfect way to keep the sweat at bay. 200 ml of Police Dark 200 ml of Police Gold Wings Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
